message:
fix: update 59 tests for enterprise dashboard framework changes (#9747)

Fixes #9737

Compliance dashboard tests: PR #9733 converted 12 enterprise dashboards
to use UnifiedDashboard wrappers (default exports). The default exports
now include UnifiedDashboard which renders DashboardHealthIndicator,
which calls useNavigate() requiring Router context. Tests now import
the *Content named exports instead, testing the dashboard content
directly without the UnifiedDashboard wrapper.

ComplianceFrameworks test: the named export { ComplianceFrameworks } was
replaced by a default export. Test now imports ComplianceFrameworksContent.

CiliumStatus test: the test lives in a __tests__ subdirectory but all
vi.mock paths were relative to the component directory (one level up).
Fixed mock paths for useCachedCiliumStatus, useGlobalFilters,
useDrillDown, CardDataContext, lib/cards, ui/CardControls, and
ui/StatusBadge to resolve correctly from __tests__/.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
